$comment: Generated by bin/generate-ag-ui-schema from ag-ui sdks/python (77 models). Do not edit.

ActivityDeltaEvent.description: Event containing a JSON Patch delta for an activity message.
ActivityDeltaEvent.title: ActivityDeltaEvent

ActivityMessage.description: An activity progress message emitted between chat messages.
ActivityMessage.title: ActivityMessage

ActivitySnapshotEvent.description: Event containing a snapshot of an activity message.
ActivitySnapshotEvent.title: ActivitySnapshotEvent

AgentCapabilities.description:
A categorized snapshot of an agent's current capabilities.

All fields are optional — agents only declare what they support. Omitted fields mean the capability is not declared
(unknown), not that it's unsupported.

The `custom` field is an escape hatch for integration-specific capabilities that don't fit into the standard
categories.

custom.description: Integration-specific capabilities not covered by the standard categories.
custom.title: Custom

execution.description: Execution control and limits (code execution, timeouts, iteration caps).

multimodal.description: Multimodal input/output support (images, audio, video, files).

output.description: Output format support (structured output, MIME types).

reasoning.description: Reasoning and thinking support (chain-of-thought, encrypted thinking).

state.description: State and memory management (snapshots, deltas, persistence).

tools.description: Tools the agent provides and tool calling configuration.

transport.description: Supported transport mechanisms (SSE, WebSocket, binary, etc.).

AgentCapabilities.title: AgentCapabilities

BaseEvent.description: Base event for all events in the Agent User Interaction Protocol.
BaseEvent.title: BaseEvent

BaseMessage.description: A base message, modelled after OpenAI messages.
BaseMessage.title: BaseMessage

BinaryInputContent.description: A deprecated binary payload reference in a multimodal user message.
BinaryInputContent.title: BinaryInputContent

ExecutionCapabilities.description:
Execution control and limits.

Declare these so clients can set expectations about how long or how many steps an agent run might take.

codeExecution.description: Set `True` if the agent can execute code (e.g., Python, JavaScript) during a run.
codeExecution.title: Codeexecution

maxExecutionTime.description: Maximum wall-clock time (in milliseconds) the agent will run before timing out.
maxExecutionTime.title: Maxexecutiontime

maxIterations.description: Maximum number of tool-call/reasoning iterations the agent will perform per run. Helps clients display progress or set timeout expectations.
maxIterations.title: Maxiterations

sandboxed.description: Set `True` if code execution happens in a sandboxed/isolated environment. Only meaningful when `code_execution` is `True`.
sandboxed.title: Sandboxed

ExecutionCapabilities.title: ExecutionCapabilities

FunctionCall.description: Name and arguments of a function call.
FunctionCall.title: FunctionCall

HumanInTheLoopCapabilities.description:
Human-in-the-loop interaction support.

Enable these when your agent can pause execution to request human input, approval, or feedback before continuing.

approvals.description: Set `True` if the agent can pause and request explicit approval before performing sensitive actions (e.g., sending emails, deleting data).
approvals.title: Approvals

approveWithEdits.description: Set `true` if tool-call interrupts accept editedArgs in the resume payload. Only meaningful when interrupts is true.
approveWithEdits.title: Approvewithedits

feedback.description: Set `True` if the agent can incorporate user feedback (thumbs up/down, corrections) to improve its behavior within the current session.
feedback.title: Feedback

interrupts.description: Set `true` if the agent participates in the AG-UI interrupt protocol (emits RUN_FINISHED with outcome={"type": "interrupt", "interrupts": [...]}, accepts resume[]).
interrupts.title: Interrupts

interventions.description: Set `True` if the agent allows humans to intervene and modify its plan mid-execution.
interventions.title: Interventions

supported.description: Set `True` if the agent supports any form of human-in-the-loop interaction.
supported.title: Supported

HumanInTheLoopCapabilities.title: HumanInTheLoopCapabilities

IdentityCapabilities.description:
Basic metadata about the agent.

Useful for discovery UIs, agent marketplaces, and debugging. Set these when you want clients to display agent
information or when multiple agents are available and users need to pick one.

description.description: What this agent does — helps users and routing logic decide when to use it.
description.title: Description

documentationUrl.description: URL to the agent's documentation or homepage.
documentationUrl.title: Documentationurl

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for integration-specific identity info.
metadata.title: Metadata

name.description: Human-readable name shown in UIs and agent selectors.
name.title: Name

provider.description: Organization or team that maintains this agent.
provider.title: Provider

type.description: The framework or platform powering this agent (e.g., "langgraph", "mastra", "crewai").
type.title: Type

version.description: Semantic version of the agent (e.g., "1.2.0"). Useful for compatibility checks.
version.title: Version

IdentityCapabilities.title: IdentityCapabilities

Interrupt.description:
A pause carried inside ``RunFinishedEvent.outcome`` when the outcome is
``RunFinishedInterruptOutcome``. The client resumes
by addressing this interrupt in the resume array of the next RunAgentInput.
Interrupt.title: Interrupt

MessagesSnapshotEvent.description: Event containing a snapshot of the messages.
MessagesSnapshotEvent.title: MessagesSnapshotEvent

MultiAgentCapabilities.description:
Multi-agent coordination capabilities.

Enable these when your agent can orchestrate or hand off work to other agents.

delegation.description: Set `True` if the agent can delegate subtasks to other agents while retaining control.
delegation.title: Delegation

handoffs.description: Set `True` if the agent can transfer the conversation entirely to another agent.
handoffs.title: Handoffs

subAgents.description: List of sub-agents this agent can invoke. Helps clients build agent selection UIs.
subAgents.title: Subagents

supported.description: Set `True` if the agent participates in any form of multi-agent coordination.
supported.title: Supported

MultiAgentCapabilities.title: MultiAgentCapabilities

MultimodalCapabilities.description:
Multimodal input and output support.

Organized into `input` and `output` sub-objects so clients can independently query what the agent accepts versus
what it produces.

input.description: Modalities the agent can accept as input (images, audio, video, PDFs, files).

output.description: Modalities the agent can produce as output (images, audio).

MultimodalCapabilities.title: MultimodalCapabilities

MultimodalInputCapabilities.description:
Modalities the agent can accept as input.

Clients use this to show/hide file upload buttons, audio recorders, image pickers, etc.

audio.description: Set `True` if the agent can process audio inputs (speech, recordings).
audio.title: Audio

file.description: Set `True` if the agent can process arbitrary file uploads.
file.title: File

image.description: Set `True` if the agent can process image inputs (e.g., screenshots, photos).
image.title: Image

pdf.description: Set `True` if the agent can process PDF documents.
pdf.title: Pdf

video.description: Set `True` if the agent can process video inputs.
video.title: Video

MultimodalInputCapabilities.title: MultimodalInputCapabilities

MultimodalOutputCapabilities.description:
Modalities the agent can produce as output.

Clients use this to anticipate rich content in the agent's response.

audio.description: Set `True` if the agent can produce audio output (text-to-speech, audio files).
audio.title: Audio

image.description: Set `True` if the agent can generate images as part of its response.
image.title: Image

MultimodalOutputCapabilities.title: MultimodalOutputCapabilities

OutputCapabilities.description:
Output format support.

Enable `structured_output` when your agent can return responses conforming to a JSON schema, which is useful for
programmatic consumption.

structuredOutput.description: Set `True` if the agent can produce structured JSON output matching a provided schema.
structuredOutput.title: Structuredoutput

supportedMimeTypes.description: MIME types the agent can produce (e.g., `["text/plain", "application/json"]`). Omit if the agent only produces plain text.
supportedMimeTypes.title: Supportedmimetypes

OutputCapabilities.title: OutputCapabilities

ReasoningCapabilities.description:
Reasoning and thinking capabilities.

Enable these when your agent exposes its internal thought process (e.g., chain-of-thought, extended thinking).

encrypted.description: Set `True` if reasoning content is encrypted (zero-data-retention mode). Clients should expect opaque `encrypted_value` fields instead of readable content.
encrypted.title: Encrypted

streaming.description: Set `True` if reasoning tokens are streamed incrementally (vs. returned all at once).
streaming.title: Streaming

supported.description: Set `True` if the agent produces reasoning/thinking tokens visible to the client.
supported.title: Supported

ReasoningCapabilities.title: ReasoningCapabilities

ReasoningEncryptedValueEvent.description: Event containing an encrypted value for a message or tool call.
ReasoningEncryptedValueEvent.title: ReasoningEncryptedValueEvent

ReasoningEndEvent.description: Event indicating the end of a reasoning phase.
ReasoningEndEvent.title: ReasoningEndEvent

ReasoningMessage.description: A reasoning message containing the agent's internal reasoning process.
ReasoningMessage.title: ReasoningMessage

ReasoningMessageChunkEvent.description: Event containing a chunk of reasoning message content.
ReasoningMessageChunkEvent.title: ReasoningMessageChunkEvent

ReasoningMessageContentEvent.description: Event containing a piece of reasoning message content.
ReasoningMessageContentEvent.title: ReasoningMessageContentEvent

ReasoningMessageEndEvent.description: Event indicating the end of a reasoning message.
ReasoningMessageEndEvent.title: ReasoningMessageEndEvent

ReasoningMessageStartEvent.description: Event indicating the start of a reasoning message.
ReasoningMessageStartEvent.title: ReasoningMessageStartEvent

ReasoningStartEvent.description: Event indicating the start of a reasoning phase.
ReasoningStartEvent.title: ReasoningStartEvent

ResumeEntry.description: A per-interrupt response in the resume array of a RunAgentInput.
ResumeEntry.title: ResumeEntry

RunErrorEvent.description: Event indicating that a run has encountered an error.
RunErrorEvent.title: RunErrorEvent

RunFinishedEvent.description:
Event indicating that a run has finished.

`outcome` is optional. Producers written before the interrupt-aware run
lifecycle simply omit it (legacy back-compat). Newer producers set it
explicitly to ``RunFinishedSuccessOutcome`` (``{"type": "success"}``) or
``RunFinishedInterruptOutcome`` (``{"type": "interrupt", "interrupts": [...]}``).
The interrupt list lives inside the outcome so it travels with the variant
that uses it.
RunFinishedEvent.title: RunFinishedEvent

RunFinishedInterruptOutcome.description: Outcome variant signalling that a run paused on one or more interrupts.
RunFinishedInterruptOutcome.title: RunFinishedInterruptOutcome

RunFinishedSuccessOutcome.description: Outcome variant signalling that a run completed normally.
RunFinishedSuccessOutcome.title: RunFinishedSuccessOutcome

RunStartedEvent.description: Event indicating that a run has started.
RunStartedEvent.title: RunStartedEvent

StateCapabilities.description:
State and memory management capabilities.

These tell the client how the agent handles shared state and whether conversation context persists across runs.

deltas.description: Set `True` if the agent emits `STATE_DELTA` events (JSON Patch incremental updates).
deltas.title: Deltas

memory.description: Set `True` if the agent has long-term memory beyond the current thread (e.g., vector store, knowledge base, or cross-session recall).
memory.title: Memory

persistentState.description: Set `True` if state is preserved across multiple runs within the same thread. When `False`, state resets on each run.
persistentState.title: Persistentstate

snapshots.description: Set `True` if the agent emits `STATE_SNAPSHOT` events (full state replacement).
snapshots.title: Snapshots

StateCapabilities.title: StateCapabilities

StateDeltaEvent.description: Event containing a delta of the state.
StateDeltaEvent.title: StateDeltaEvent

StateSnapshotEvent.description: Event containing a snapshot of the state.
StateSnapshotEvent.title: StateSnapshotEvent

StepFinishedEvent.description: Event indicating that a step has finished.
StepFinishedEvent.title: StepFinishedEvent

StepStartedEvent.description: Event indicating that a step has started.
StepStartedEvent.title: StepStartedEvent

SubAgentInfo.description: Describes a sub-agent that can be invoked by a parent agent.

description.description: What this sub-agent specializes in. Helps clients build agent selection UIs.
description.title: Description

name.description: Unique name or identifier of the sub-agent.
name.title: Name

SubAgentInfo.title: SubAgentInfo

TextInputContent.description: A text fragment in a multimodal user message.
TextInputContent.title: TextInputContent

TextMessageChunkEvent.description: Event containing a chunk of text message content.
TextMessageChunkEvent.title: TextMessageChunkEvent

TextMessageContentEvent.description: Event containing a piece of text message content.
TextMessageContentEvent.title: TextMessageContentEvent

TextMessageEndEvent.description: Event indicating the end of a text message.
TextMessageEndEvent.title: TextMessageEndEvent

TextMessageStartEvent.description: Event indicating the start of a text message.
TextMessageStartEvent.title: TextMessageStartEvent

ThinkingEndEvent.description: Event indicating the end of a thinking step event.
ThinkingEndEvent.title: ThinkingEndEvent

ThinkingStartEvent.description: Event indicating the start of a thinking step event.
ThinkingStartEvent.title: ThinkingStartEvent

ThinkingTextMessageContentEvent.description: Event indicating a piece of a thinking text message.
ThinkingTextMessageContentEvent.title: ThinkingTextMessageContentEvent

ThinkingTextMessageEndEvent.description: Event indicating the end of a thinking text message.
ThinkingTextMessageEndEvent.title: ThinkingTextMessageEndEvent

ThinkingTextMessageStartEvent.description: Event indicating the start of a thinking text message.
ThinkingTextMessageStartEvent.title: ThinkingTextMessageStartEvent

ToolCall.description: A tool call, modelled after OpenAI tool calls.
ToolCall.title: ToolCall

ToolCallChunkEvent.description: Event containing a chunk of tool call content.
ToolCallChunkEvent.title: ToolCallChunkEvent

ToolCallEndEvent.description: Event indicating the end of a tool call.
ToolCallEndEvent.title: ToolCallEndEvent

ToolCallResultEvent.description: Event containing the result of a tool call.
ToolCallResultEvent.title: ToolCallResultEvent

ToolCallStartEvent.description: Event indicating the start of a tool call.
ToolCallStartEvent.title: ToolCallStartEvent

ToolsCapabilities.description:
Tool calling capabilities.

Distinguishes between tools the agent itself provides (listed in `items`) and tools the client passes at runtime
via `RunAgentInput.tools`. Enable this when your agent can call functions, search the web, execute code, etc.

clientProvided.description: Set `True` if the agent accepts and uses tools provided by the client at runtime.
clientProvided.title: Clientprovided

items.description: The tools this agent provides on its own (full JSON Schema definitions). These are distinct from client-provided tools passed in `RunAgentInput.tools`.
items.title: Items

parallelCalls.description: Set `True` if the agent can invoke multiple tools concurrently within a single step.
parallelCalls.title: Parallelcalls

supported.description: Set `True` if the agent can make tool calls at all. Set `False` to explicitly signal tool calling is disabled even if items are present.
supported.title: Supported

ToolsCapabilities.title: ToolsCapabilities

TransportCapabilities.description:
Declares which transport mechanisms the agent supports.

Clients use this to pick the best connection strategy. Only set flags to `True` for transports your agent actually
handles — omit or set `False` for unsupported ones.

httpBinary.description: Set `True` if the agent supports the AG-UI binary protocol (protobuf over HTTP).
httpBinary.title: Httpbinary

pushNotifications.description: Set `True` if the agent can send async updates via webhooks after a run finishes.
pushNotifications.title: Pushnotifications

resumable.description: Set `True` if the agent supports resuming interrupted streams via sequence numbers.
resumable.title: Resumable

streaming.description: Set `True` if the agent streams responses via SSE. Most agents enable this.
streaming.title: Streaming

websocket.description: Set `True` if the agent accepts persistent WebSocket connections.
websocket.title: Websocket

TransportCapabilities.title: TransportCapabilities

UserMessage.description: A user message supporting text or multimodal content.
UserMessage.title: UserMessage
